title: Buttery Mediterranean Pudding Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with a rich, buttery Mediterranean pudding. Perfect as a dessert or snack.
instructions: Heat 1/2 cup olive oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Prepare the Mediterranean Fritter Batter according to the package instructions.
Pour the Buttery Pudding Mix into a large bowl and mix with 1/2 cup of cold water until smooth.
Add the prepared fritter batter to the pudding mix and stir until combined.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the pudding-fritter mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
Dust the fritters with confectioners' sugar and garnish with fresh mint leaves.
